content.full_text:
Re:
F,q,In Porrrrc.tr, Pnacrlcgs ConrvrrssloN
P.O. Box 807 . 428 J Street . Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 . Fax (916) 322-0886
June 5, 2001
Lenna J. Tanner, City Clerk
City of Chino
13220 Central Avenue
Chino, CA91709
Your Request for Advice
Our File No. G-0f-128
Dear Ms. Tanner
Also enclosed is a pamphlet entitled, "canr vote? A conflict of Interest
overview" which may provide you general assistance in this area of the law.
Should you have any additional questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660
Very truly yours,
Menchaca
oan Giannetta
Secretary, Legal Division
tie
Enclosures
1 Government Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections
18109-18997, of the Califomia Code of Regulations.
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the
Political Reform Act (the "Act").' The Fair Political Practices Commission does not
render advice on past conduct. I enclose a copy of Regulati on 18329 for your review.
ffi

embedding.summary: This is an FPPC advice letter responding to City Clerk Lenna J. Tanner's request regarding the Political Reform Act and conflict of interest matters. The FPPC clarifies its limitations regarding past conduct and provides regulatory references and educational materials.
